title: Cisco Soars on Sales Forecast, AI-Focused Restructuring Plan
description: Cisco Systems Inc. gained as much as 19% in late trading after the company delivered a better-than-anticipated sales forecast and announced plans to cut thousands of jobs, an attempt to focus on the fast-growing AI market.

title: Amazon Puts Alexa Inside the Shopping Search Bar in AI Push
description: Artificial intelligence algorithms are coming to some of the most valuable real estate in retail: the Amazon.com Inc. search bar.

title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras Expects to Price Its IPO at $185 Per Share
description: Cerebras Systems Inc. expects to price its US initial public offering at $185 per share, according to people familiar with the matter, as the artificial intelligence chipmaker seizes on the surging demand for semiconductors.
